description:
Analyze the aerodynamic braking effectiveness of the NREL 5MW reference turbine using QBlade's Rotor BEM Simulation. Load the 'NREL 5MW Reference' project from ~/Documents/sample_projects/ and determine the 'Runaway TSR' (the Tip Speed Ratio where the Power Coefficient Cp drops to 0) for both 0° Pitch and 5° Pitch by running simulations over a TSR range of 0 to 20 with a step of 0.5. Save the project to ~/Documents/projects/braking_analysis.wpa and create a text report at ~/Documents/projects/runaway_report.txt with the following format:

Runaway_TSR_0deg: [Value]
Runaway_TSR_5deg: [Value]
